creator: avayaduggu93@gmail.com
text: Father's Day is just around the corner, and Americans are spending more than ever on dads, according to the National Retail Federation. And we're not just buying for our own fathers: Last year, a little more than half bought presents for a dad or stepdad, while 28% bought Father's Day gifts for his or her husbands, almost 10% bought for a son, and 5% even bought Father's Day gifts for near. http://fathersdayprintables.com/fathers-day-ideas-to-surprise/
